Label: Description
Value: A live list of all past and present Humanitarian Response Plans, with identifiers for use in International Aid Transparency Initiative (IATI) reporting and elsewhere. The UN and its partners prepare a Humanitarian Response Plan (HRP) plan for a protracted or sudden onset emergency that requires international humanitarian assistance. The plan articulates the shared vision of how to respond to the assessed and expressed needs of the affected population.

Label: Caveats/Comments
Value: All currency amounts are in USD. The JSON resource contains complete information, while the CSV resource is a simplified version for convenient spreadsheet use.

Label: Description
Value: HXL-hashtagged CSV list of Humanitarian Response Plans dating back to 1999, with HXL hashtags, converted live from the JSON API output.
